mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (from_user_id, to_user_id, product_id, message_type, message, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{productId}, #{messageType}, #{message}, #{isRead}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN cm.from_user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN cm.to_user_id ELSE cm.from_user_id END AS userId, MAX(u.username) AS username, MAX(u.avatar) AS avatar, cm.product_id AS productId, MAX(p.title) AS productTitle, MAX(p.images) AS productImage, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(cm.message ORDER BY cm.create_time DESC SEPARATOR '|||'), '|||', 1) AS lastMessage, MAX(cm.create_time) AS lastMessageTime, SUM(CASE WHEN cm.to_user_id = #{currentUserId} AND cm.is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreadCount FROM chat_message cm INNER JOIN user u ON (CASE WHEN cm.from_user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN cm.to_user_id ELSE cm.from_user_id END) = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON cm.product_id = p.id WHERE cm.from_user_id = #{currentUserId} OR cm.to_user_id = #{currentUserId} GROUP BY userId, cm.product_id ORDER BY lastMessageTime DESC
